creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Random coredumps and inexplicable compile errors are a prime indicator 
of bad memory. 


PRs of this type should be sent to -current, anyways.  Besides, the fact 
that you were the only person complaining about ld.so being broken 
should have made you at least suspect a less generic bug.  :)
